entities.birthday_girl: a girl wearing a paper crown
entities.friend_1: a boy in a bow tie
entities.friend_2: a girl with curly red hair

scenes.title: The Birthday Party
scenes.background_prompt: A decorated living room with colorful balloons, a table with party plates and cups, wrapped presents in a pile, and a banner reading 'Happy Birthday'. No people.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A decorated living room for a birthday party. A girl of about seven wearing a shiny paper crown and a pink party dress stands at the head of a table covered in a polka-dot tablecloth. A boy in a white shirt and a green bow tie sits to her left, clapping his hands excitedly. A girl with curly red hair and freckles in a yellow sundress sits across the table, blowing a party horn. A woman in a blue blouse carefully carries a round chocolate cake with seven lit candles toward the table from the kitchen doorway. Colorful balloons in red, blue, and gold are tied to the backs of chairs. A pile of wrapped presents in shiny paper sits on a side table. A banner reading 'Happy Birthday' stretches across the wall in glittery letters.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place birthday_girl at the head of the table, standing, wearing paper crown and pink dress. Place friend_1 to her left, sitting and clapping. Place friend_2 across the table, sitting and blowing a party horn. Place mother in the kitchen doorway (right), carrying a round chocolate cake with lit candles toward the table.
scenes.scene_description: In the immediate foreground, horizontal light-brown wooden floorboards stretch across the bottom of the frame. On the far left, a large green balloon and a large yellow balloon are tied together, partially obscuring a smaller green balloon, an orange balloon, and a light blue balloon further back. To the right of these balloons, friend_1, a young boy with short brown hair, sits on a wooden chair; he wears a yellow long-sleeved shirt, a green bowtie, and blue overalls, and he is smiling while clapping his hands. In front of him is a table draped with a multi-colored tablecloth featuring segments of yellow, red, and blue. On the table sits a stack of colorful plates in shades of red, yellow, and blue, a stack of blue and orange cups, a single blue and yellow cup, a light-blue cake stand with a scalloped edge, and a blue and yellow party horn. Behind the table stands the birthday_girl, a young girl with brown hair tied in a braid; she wears a golden crown decorated with colorful jewels and a pink dress with a white collar, looking toward the right with a smile. To her right, friend_2, a girl with voluminous curly red hair, sits on another wooden chair; she wears a blue jacket over a green and yellow striped shirt and is blowing into a blue and yellow party horn. Above the children, two banners are strung across a yellow-striped wall; the top banner consists of colorful pennants spelling "Happy" with heart-decorated pennants at each end, while the bottom banner spells "Birthday" in similar colorful pennants. To the right of friend_2, several wrapped gifts are stacked on and around a tan armchair; the gifts are wrapped in various colors including blue, orange, green, red, and purple, each tied with a contrasting ribbon. Behind the gifts, another cluster of balloons in shades of orange, yellow, and light blue floats near the ceiling. Further right, mother, a woman with curly brown hair tied back with a yellow bow, walks into the scene from the right; she wears a green jacket over a blue dress with white polka dots and brown boots, and she is holding a two-layer chocolate cake topped with several lit white candles on a white plate. Behind mother, a large bunch of balloons in green, yellow, orange, red, and blue is visible. The scene transitions from the indoor room to an outdoor area through a large opening, showing a bright day with a clear blue sky, fluffy white clouds, green trees, and a grassy lawn dotted with small flowers.
